title: Sort that kit!
description: Sort that kit! is a client-only mod that instantly organizes your inventory 🎒 and hotbar 🔥 with custom keybinds 🎮 and visual previews 👀. Design layouts in settings ⚙️ and apply them on any server 🌐 with one tap 👆.
body:

[![Join DC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/944e491bb266730cc410f8ace60a605419641549_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/mP23dpVQ6V)

## **Sort that kit! (Client-Side) 🧩**  
**Sort that kit!** is a powerful inventory management mod ⚡ that instantly reorganizes your **Hotbar and Main Inventory** 🎒 with a single key. It works entirely **client-side** 💻, meaning it functions on any server 🌐 by simulating fast, automated item movements 🤖.

# ⚠️ **Important:**
 On some servers, this mod **may be bannable** 🚫 because it moves items extremely quickly by rapidly shifting them back and forth. Always check the server rules before using it!

### 📂 **Open Menu:**
 Press **K** to open the configuration menu.

## **Main Features: 🚀**

- **Custom Profiles 🛠️:** Create and save multiple layouts for different playstyles (e.g., ⚔️ PvP, 🏗️ Building, ⛏️ Mining).

- **Per-Profile Keybinds ⌨️:** Switch between your layouts instantly by assigning a unique hotkey to every individual profile.

- **Visual Preview 👁️:** Design your ideal setup in the settings using a visual "Ghost-Grid." Drag and drop item placeholders to define exactly where each item should go.

- **Full Inventory Control 🎯:** The mod intelligently swaps items between your main inventory and hotbar to match your saved preview perfectly.

- **Server Compatible 🌍:** No server-side plugins required. It works by sending optimized packets 📡, making it the ultimate tool for universal inventory organization.

# ❓ Can I use this mod in a modpack? 📦

***Of course! Please feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!*** 💜✨

You may:

* ✅ Use this mod in public and private modpacks
* ✅ Upload modpacks containing this mod to Modrinth, CurseForge, etc.
* ✅ Use it on servers and with friends

Just please:

* ❌ Do not reupload the mod itself
* ❌ Do not claim the mod as your own

Have fun! 🌟
